inputs.label: Transaction Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total amount charged to the customer for the transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount charged to the customer for the transaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteriden işlem için tahsil edilen toplam tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetrag, der dem Kunden für die Transaktion berechnet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total facturé au client pour la transaction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total cobrado al cliente por la transacción.

inputs.label: Processing Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage fee charged by the processor on the transaction amount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage fee charged by the processor on the transaction amount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlemci tarafından işlem tutarı üzerinden alınan yüzde ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatzgebühr, die vom Prozessor auf den Transaktionsbetrag erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais en pourcentage facturés par le processeur sur le montant de la transaction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de comisión cobrado por el procesador sobre el monto de la transacción.

inputs.label: Per-Transaction Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged per transaction by the processor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed fee charged per transaction by the processor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlemci tarafından işlem başına alınan sabit ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Gebühr pro Transaktion, die vom Prozessor erhoben wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais fixes facturés par transaction par le processeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión fija cobrada por transacción por el procesador.

inputs.label: Monthly Statement Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed monthly fee for account maintenance, distributed across transactions.

label_i18n.es: Comisión mensual de estado de cuenta

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed monthly fee for account maintenance, distributed across transactions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap bakımı için sabit aylık ücret, işlemlere dağıtılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste monatliche Gebühr für die Kontoführung, verteilt auf Transaktionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais mensuels fixes pour la maintenance du compte, répartis sur les transactions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Comisión fija mensual por mantenimiento de cuenta, distribuida entre las transacciones.

inputs.label: Number of Monthly Transactions
inputs.businessContext: Total number of transactions processed per month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of transactions processed per month.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Monat verarbeiteten Transaktionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de transactions traitées par mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de transacciones procesadas por mes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
